name: pmm-ops
description: 5 PMM skills: SuperPMM (AI-powered GTM Builder, 5-step workflow in ~60 min) + pmm-messaging (3-tier messaging & positioning) + InsideInsights (brand insight methodology — the human conflict your product resolves, via Amit Kumar's Conflict Framework) + sales-enablement (full enablement lifecycle) + voice-engine (distill any operator's public writing into a Voice Profile, then ghostwrite/audit in their voice; ships a complete Logan Hendrickson example). Plus applied/ strategy docs: the AIPMM agent blueprint and a 10x/100x use-case list. Frameworks: FletchPMM, April Dunford, Winning by Design, Atlassian, InsideInsights.
